qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_version as oi_version, t0.c_version as c_version, t0.d_version as d_version, SEC.policy, t0.c_version as CODE, t0.d_version as TEXT FROM PRY14_VERSIONES as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusProject.Base.Project.Versiones.VERSION\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_version LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_version asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_version as oi_version, SEC.policy FROM PRY14_VERSIONES as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusProject.Base.Project.Versiones.VERSION\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_version LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_version asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusProject.Base.Project.Versiones.VERSION.QUERY
NucleusProject.Base.Project.Versiones.VERSION.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(PRY14_VERSIONES.oi_version) as CNT from PRY14_VERSIONES Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and PRY14_VERSIONES.oi_version={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(PRY14_VERSIONES.d_version,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(PRY14_VERSIONES.c_version,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
